load_model_button: Load a new model into memory. This will replace the currently loaded model.
offload_model_button: Offload the currently loaded model from memory to free up resources.
show_llm_log_button: Show or hide the LLM and system log window.
start_jobs_button: Start the automated job processing sequence.
stop_jobs_button: Stop the automated job processing sequence.
job_dropdown: Select a manual job to run.
theme_dropdown: Select a theme for the application.
refresh_prompt_button: Refresh the prompt from the current mode.
send_button: Send the message to the model (Ctrl+Enter).
cancel_settings_button: Close the settings window without saving.
refresh_prompt_index_button: Refresh the prompt index from subfolders.
save_as_mode_button: Save the current prompt as a new mode.
preview_theme_button: Preview the changes to the theme.
